reference: Hi, I am Sadie and I have been experiencing really bad tension down both sides of my neck and tension in my shoulders. It is very uncomfortable and really tight. It hurts my back when I lean my head forward. No matter what I do, the tightness does not go away. Do you have any ideas?
text: Hi, I am Sadie and I have been experiencing really bad tension down both sides of my neck and tension in my shoulders. It is very uncomfortable and really tight. It hurts my back when I lean my head forward. No matter what I do, the tightness does not go away. Do you have any ideas?
